description_long: This is a modern, upholstered chaise with a boxy, geometric form and a deep, rich teal color. The seat is wide and plush, with a thick, continuous cushion that extends from the seat to the backrest and side armrest. The backrest and a single armrest form an L-shape, providing support on two sides, while the other sides are open for easy access. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, solid fabric with no visible patterns or tufting, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. The base of the chaise is low to the ground, and no legs are visible, suggesting a platform or block-style construction. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, teal upholstered chaise with a boxy L-shaped back and armrest, featuring a smooth, solid fabric and a low, legless base. Its plush, continuous cushion and sleek design make it ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the L-shaped backrest and armrest, with the seat cushion extending to both sides.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat and the armrest on the right, with the backrest forming a corner.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid, blocky profile and the single armrest on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid backrest and the overall rectangular shape with no visible legs.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and forms a right angle with the armrest, creating an L-shaped support. It is unsegmented, with a smooth, continuous surface and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: There is a single, thick armrest on the right side (when facing the seat), matching the height and style of the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: No legs are visible; the chaise appears to have a solid, block-style base that sits directly on the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is one large, attached cushion that covers both the seat and the backrest, providing a seamless and plush seating surface with no separate or loose cushions visible.
